name: Golden Wheat Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ cup Whole wheat pastry flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a lightly oiled griddle over medium heat.
2. Combine the dry ingredients: whole wheat pastry flour, oat flour, gluten flour, baking powder, and wheat germ, along with salt.
3. Add the liquid ingredients (corn oil, brown rice syrup, water, and vanilla) to the dry mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Pour about ¼ cup batter for each pancake onto the griddle.
5. When the surface of a pancake is bubbly and the edges are firm, turn it over carefully.
6. Cook the pancake on the uncooked side until golden brown, approximately 2 minutes. Remove from heat and keep the pancakes warm until all the batter has been used.
Per serving: 217 cal, 5 g prot, 154 mg sod, 49 g carb, 0 mg cholesterol, 79 mg calcium.
